What We Do

Premium Visual Services

From cinematic drone footage to complete visual campaigns, we deliver high-impact content that elevates brands and drives measurable results.

REAL ESTATE

Cinematic Property Marketing

We create cinematic visuals that make properties look premium, desirable, and easy to sell or rent.

What we do:

  • • Drone property tours (exterior + aerial views)
  • • Interior walkthrough videos
  • • Airbnb & short-stay property showcases
  • • Luxury listing highlight videos
  • • Estate and land aerial coverage

TRAVEL

Destination Visual Content

We capture breathtaking visuals that inspire travelers and boost bookings for resorts, tours, and destinations.

What we do:

  • • Hotel & resort promotional videos
  • • Tourism destination showcases
  • • Adventure & safari experiences
  • • Landscape & beach cinematography
  • • Travel agency content packages

BRANDS

Commercial Visual Marketing

We create compelling brand stories through professional visuals that drive engagement and sales.

What we do:

  • • Corporate brand films & commercials
  • • Product launch videos
  • • Social media content creation
  • • Event coverage & highlights
  • • Testimonial & case study videos

How We Work

Our Creative Process

From concept to delivery, we follow a proven workflow that ensures exceptional results every time.

01

Discovery Call

We discuss your project goals, vision, timeline, and specific requirements to create the perfect plan.

02

Creative Planning

Our team develops a custom shot list, storyboard, and production timeline tailored to your needs.

03

Production Day

We capture stunning footage using professional drones and cameras, working efficiently on-site.

04

Post-Production

Expert editing, color grading, music, and effects bring your content to life with cinematic quality.

05

Final Delivery

You receive high-quality files optimized for web, social media, or broadcast – ready to use immediately.

Who We Are

About KULBOI MEDIA

KULBOI MEDIA is a premium aerial cinematography and visual production company specializing in real estate, travel, and brand marketing. We combine cutting-edge drone technology with artistic vision to create content that doesn't just look good – it drives real business results.

Our team has filmed 200+ projects across 12 countries, working with real estate developers, luxury resorts, tourism boards, and commercial brands. Whether it's showcasing a multi-million dollar property, promoting a tropical destination, or telling your brand's story, we deliver visuals that captivate audiences and inspire action.

We don't just take pretty pictures – we understand what makes people book, buy, and engage. Every project is approached with strategic thinking, creative excellence, and a commitment to exceeding expectations. Let's create something extraordinary together.
